prompt: A shop had 15 apples. It sold 6 in the morning and 4 in the afternoon, then received a delivery of 10 more. How many apples does the shop have now?
Tom has 3 boxes with 12 pencils each. He gives away 8 pencils. How many pencils does he have left?
A train travels 60 km in 45 minutes. At the same constant speed, how many kilometers does it travel in 3 hours?
Sarah is twice as old as Ben. In 5 years, the sum of their ages will be 40. How old is Sarah now?
A rectangle is 8 cm by 5 cm. What is its perimeter in cm?
An empty tank is filled at 15 liters per minute for 8 minutes, then drained at 10 liters per minute for 6 minutes. How many liters are in the tank at the end?
A book has 240 pages. Mia reads one third of the book on Monday, then one fourth of the remaining pages on Tuesday. How many pages are left unread?
A farmer has chickens and cows. Together they have 20 heads and 56 legs. How many cows are there?
